git_project_bootstrap.description: Create or verify an independent Git project workspace.
git_project_bootstrap.notes: Git should already be available on the server.

github_project_workflow.description: Push and verify project changes through GitHub remotes.
github_project_workflow.notes: Requires existing GitHub SSH access. Do not create or expose credentials.

python_fastapi_smoke.description: Build and test a minimal Python FastAPI service.
python_fastapi_smoke.notes: Install packages only inside the target project virtualenv.

node_static_site_smoke.description: Build and test a minimal Node/Vite static site.
node_static_site_smoke.notes: Node runtime installation requires human approval if missing.

oris_registry_update.description: Update ORIS project_registry for a new or existing project.
